MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephanie A. Sheridan, Esq., and Kelly Savage Day, Esq., from Sedgwick, LLP, 415-781-7900, for Defendant and moving party
Rosemary M. Rivas, Esq., and Danielle A. Stoumbos, Esq., from Finkelstein Thompson LLP, 415-398-8700, for Plaintiff and opposing party
John Parker, Esq., from Kershaw Cutter & Ratinoff, LLP, 916-448-9800, for plaintiff and opposing party

Discussed and The court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied without prejudice to re-asserting some or all of the same arguments in opposition to a motion for class certification. The amended complaint does not on its face show that this action is not amenable to class treatment. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
